//: Template catalog shipped with an installed McpOrchestrator tool. Add one entry per
//1: downstream MCP server you want to reach. The example below is disabled — copy it,
//setup: Either edit this file in place, or (recommended) set MCP_ORCHESTRATOR_CONFIG to the
//3: absolute path of your own config file so upgrades don't overwrite it.
//tokens: ${CONFIG_DIR} = this file's folder; any other ${VAR} resolves from an environment variable.

capabilities.name: example
capabilities.summary: Example downstream MCP — replace with a real one.
capabilities.instructions: Describe when to use this capability and exactly what arguments to pass (e.g. 'always include the issue key as {"issueKey":"PROJ-123"}').
